title: Section 29
content: The Bank shall not be liable to the payment of any stamp duty under the Indian Stamp Act, 1899 (2 of 1899) in respect of bank notes 1*** issued by it.
footnote: 1. The words "or Burma notes" omitted by Act 11 of 1947, s. 16 (w.e.f. 1-4-1947) which was earlier inserted by the M.O. 1937.
